TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Payljus ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Laygi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 217 buwan, 664 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 644 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 20 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 95%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Payljus hya' ga Vungalid. tay 'llaw na Payljus hya' ga Takamimura. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pajljus~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu lajɣi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na pajljus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa *uŋali*. taj ʔllaw na pajljus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa takamimura. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Payljus ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Laygi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 217 buwan, 664 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 644 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 20 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 95%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Payljus hya' ga Vungalid. tay 'llaw na Payljus hya' ga Takamimura. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pajljus~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu lajɣi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na pajljus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa *uŋali*. taj ʔllaw na pajljus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa takamimura. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
